title: What is your favorite least fave rendition of Evangelion
display_title: What is your favorite least fave rendition of Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: What is your favorite/least fave rendition of Evangelion? Post by StellarKei » Sat Jan 01, 2011 4:06 pm The TV series? End of Eva? Death/Rebirth? Rebuild? Manga? Puchi Eva? Some spin off like Angelic Days? Discuss! Personally my favorites so far are definitely the manga and Rebuild. The characters seem to have more depth, the action is better, and I find the plot more engaging in them. As far as least favorite rendition... I can't say I personally like the TV series the most. While I like it because so far it's the most "conclusive" of them all obviously (along with EoE), it just lacks what the manga and newer Rebuild have for some reason. I don't -hate- it though. As far as spinoffs go... Angelic Days was rather weak, but Puchi Eva is love. Puchi Eva has wonderful comedy and it's so damn cute. xD <3

[]: Post by child of Lilith » Sat Jan 01, 2011 4:13 pm I like the TV series and the two original movies the best. I don't particularly care for the manga or rebuild.

[]: Post by Xard » Sat Jan 01, 2011 4:27 pm 4. *insert random crap like Ikari Shinji raising project here* 3. Mango (meh) 2. Rebuild 1. Original

[]: Post by InstrumentalityOne » Sat Jan 01, 2011 4:55 pm The manga is kind of cool, I guess, but NGETV and EoE are the best IMHO. Death is also a nice thing to be re-watched sometimes. Rebuild is okay, still have to watch the remaining 2 movies to pass a proper judgement on it.

[]: Post by StellarKei » Sat Jan 01, 2011 4:58 pm I knew I'd be the weird one here liking the mango and Rebuild best. xD;; Don't get me wrong though, the TV series and EoE both have their good points in my book

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 01, 2011 5:41 pm with the exception of that godawful piece of shit Angelic Days and the extremely useless and pointless (to me) Death and Rebirth, I like pretty much most of the EVA stuff out there to varying degrees, though I have to see all of Rebuild to give it a full, concise opinion

[]: Post by Fireball » Sat Jan 01, 2011 6:30 pm god tier: neon genesis evangelion: the end of evangelion neon genesis evangelion high tier: evangelion: 2.0 you can (not) advance evangelion: 1.0 you are (not) alone mid tier: neon genesis evangelion (manga) neon genesis evangelion: death & rebirth low tier: petit eva: evangelion@school angelic days tier: neon genesis evangelion: angelic days

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:19 pm The manga and the series both have some things I'd consider flaws, but honestly I think the manga arguably handles a lot of things better than the show, despite some parts that I wish hadn't been left out. The manga's versions of sync training and the progression from Bardiel to Zeruel are easily far better than the original tv series' handling of them, for instance. Its equivalent to EoE is also shaping up pretty interestingly, and I'll be very interested to see how its finale compares. Both, regardless, are utterly fantastic works. Rebuild is worse than Shinji Ikari Raising Project, and arguably also worse than syphilis.

[]: Post by Clover » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:25 pm 1. End of Evangelion 2. Rebuild 3. Original Series 4. Death and Rebirth 5. Retake 6. Manga 7. Eva porn doujins 8. Petit Eva ~Evangelion@School~

[]: Post by Reichu » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:33 pm All of the original series is lumped together in my brain and collectively is at the top of the pile. I have my eyes on NME with interest. (First installment IMO kind of bland, second much more stimulating.) I've followed Sadamoto's manga, but it hasn't managed to really stimulate me at all. Not going to say I hate it with a fiery burning passion or compare it to a VD or anything; I'm even open to giving it more chances to endear itself to me. Not that it necessarily will. NGE2 is a fun diversion that complements the show nicely. Don't really care about the other stuff.

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:35 pm I like the manga better than the TV series mainly because I think it handled certain things better than the TV series such as Toji's arc. I also really enjoy Rebuild and EoE. To esselfortium.

[]: Post by esselfortium » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:38 pm Grimmjow wrote: To esselfortium. [an image macro]

[]: Post by Clover » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:39 pm esselfortium wrote: Cool. I like my opinion, too :-)

[]: Post by Hatsumi92 » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:46 pm The Best: Neon Genesis Evangelion The End of Evangelion Rebuild of Evangelion Manga The Good: Eva@School (whatever it's name is, I find it cute and rather funny) Campus Apocalypse The meh: Shinji Ikari Raising Project manga (other spin offs too) The Worst: Angelic Days

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:51 pm esselfortium wrote: Cool. I like my opinion, too :-) VV edit: Buh? I just saw the post and replied to it. VV

[]: Post by Hatsumi92 » Sat Jan 01, 2011 7:55 pm Grimmjow wrote: Shinji Ikari Raising Project, from what I've seen appears to be little more than a harem mangu with Misato massaging Rei's boobs. Wait....

[]: Post by Grimmjow » Sat Jan 01, 2011 8:02 pm Hatsumi92 wrote: It's like.. fan service.. but not very well drawn fan service. I only have one volume and it's good enough to pass the time. By the end of the book I was basically like "Okay, so that happened." and never touched it again.

[]: lolopinions. Okay, going to watch more K-ON! now. Post by Killer Bee » Sat Jan 01, 2011 8:03 pm NGE + EoE is the best, of course. I don't know why anyone would prefer any other rendition(except maybe the manga). Rebuild is more of a novelty than anything; a simplified NGE with gorgeous modern animation. Without knowing where Rebuild's going to end up, or if it even comes close to matching EoE's brilliance, I don't see how anyone could regard it as anything more than eye-candy at this point. The manga has its high points and low points. I like some of the way the scenes are played out in the manga much better than NGE(Shinji visiting Rei's apartment and making her tea, the whole Dance Like You Want To Win saga, Kaji's backstory, etc.) but a lot of the characterization is pretty stupid(Sadamoto's Asuka is completely one-dimensional compared to Anno's Asuka). Angelic Days and ISRP are fun breaks from the doom-and-gloom. I don't get why so many people feel the need to shit on them; ISRP is just for laughs and fap material, no one should be looking for a plot. Eva@School is funny, but very repetitive.

[]: Re: lolopinions. Okay, going to watch more K-ON! now. Post by StellarKei » Sat Jan 01, 2011 8:10 pm Killer Bee wrote: I like some of the way the scenes are played out in the manga much better than NGE(Shinji visiting Rei's apartment and making her tea, the whole Dance Like You Want To Win saga, Kaji's backstory, etc.) but a lot of the characterization is pretty stupid(Sadamoto's Asuka is completely one-dimensional compared to Anno's Asuka).

[]: Post by GasmaskAvenger » Sat Jan 01, 2011 8:15 pm SIRP > Angelic Days because the artwork in SIRP doesn't make my eyes bleed esselfortium wrote: Rebuild is worse than Shinji Ikari Raising Project, and arguably also worse than syphilis.
